UnitAbilities.Title: Regenerating Monstrosity
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of each player’s Command phase, this model regains up to D3 lost wounds.

Infos.Title: DAEMONIC ALLEGIANCE
Infos.Text:
When you select this model to include in your army, you must select one of the following keywords for it to gain:
	▪ Khorne
	▪ Tzeentch
	▪ Nurgle
	▪ Slaanesh
The keyword you select will also affect some of this model’s characteristics (see the Daemonic Allegiance section).

Sections.Title: Creature of Khorne:
Sections.Text: If this model has the Khorne keyword, add 2 to the Strength characteristic of this model's melee weapons.

Sections.Title: Creature of Tzeentch:
Sections.Text: If this model has the Tzeentch keyword, this model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

Sections.Title: Creature of Nurgle:
Sections.Text: If this model has the Nurgle keyword, add 1 to this model's Toughness characteristic.

Sections.Title: Creature of Slaanesh:
Sections.Text: If this model has the Slaanesh keyword, add 2" to this model's Move characteristic.

UnitAbilities.Title: Warp Spines
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it and roll one D6: on a 2-3, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 4-5, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-4 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: DAEMONIC ALLEGIANCE
Infos.Text:
When you select this model to include in your army, you must select one of the following keywords for it to gain:
	▪ Khorne
	▪ Tzeentch
	▪ Nurgle
	▪ Slaanesh
The keyword you select will also affect some of this model’s characteristics (see the Daemonic Allegiance section).

Sections.Title: Creature of Khorne:
Sections.Text: If this model has the Khorne keyword, add 2 to the Strength characteristic of this model's melee weapons.

Sections.Title: Creature of Tzeentch:
Sections.Text: If this model has the Tzeentch keyword, this model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

Sections.Title: Creature of Nurgle:
Sections.Text: If this model has the Nurgle keyword, add 1 to this model's Toughness characteristic.

Sections.Title: Creature of Slaanesh:
Sections.Text: If this model has the Slaanesh keyword, add 2" to this model's Move characteristic.

UnitAbilities.Title: Daemonic Icon
UnitAbilities.Text: Models in the bearer’s unit have a Leadership characteristic of 6+.

UnitAbilities.Title: Instrument of Chaos
UnitAbilities.Text: Add 1 to Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Bounding Assault
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this unit ends a Charge move, until the end of the turn, Pox Rider plagueswords equipped by models in this unit have the [LANCE] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Pouncing Leap
UnitAbilities.Text:
You can target this unit with the Heroic Intervention stratagem, regardless of any other uses of that stratagem this phase. If you do:
▪ That use is -1 CP.
▪ That use does not prevent any uses of that stratagem on other units this phase.

UnitAbilities.Title: Emissary of the Blood God (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While a friendly Khorne Legiones Daemonica unit is within 6" of this model, you can re-roll Battle-shock tests taken for that unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Relentless Carnage
UnitAbilities.Text: At the end of the Fight phase, you can select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model and roll eight D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-8 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-8 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Emissary of the Great Mutator (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While a friendly Tzeentch Legiones Daemonica unit is within 6" of this model, you can re-roll Battle-shock tests taken for that unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Master of Magicks (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, select one of the following abilities [IGNORES COVER]; [LETHAL HITS]; [SUSTAINED HITS D3]. Until the end of the phase, this model’s ranged weapon has that ability.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-8 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-8 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Emissary of the Plague God (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While a friendly Nurgle Legiones Daemonica unit is within 6" of this model, you can re-roll Battle-shock tests taken for that unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Nurgle’s Rot (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: At the end of your Movement phase, you can select one enemy unit within 12" of this model. Until the start of your next Movement phase, subtract 1 from the Toughness characteristic of models in that unit.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-7 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-7 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Emissary of the Prince of Excess (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While a friendly Slaanesh Legiones Daemonica unit is within 6" of this model, you can re-roll Battle-shock tests taken for that unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Mesmerising Form
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time an attack targets this model, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-7 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-7 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Units.Name: HERALD OF SLAANESH ON STEED OF SLAANESH

ModelCompositions.ModelName: Herald of Slaanesh on Steed of Slaanesh

UnitAbilities.Title: Lethal Caress
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit by 1.

UnitAbilities.Title: Symphony of Pain (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: At the end of your Movement phase, you can select one enemy unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this model. Until the end of the turn, each time a Slaanesh Legiones Daemonica model from your army makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Prey on the Weak
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets an enemy unit that is Battle-shocked, add 1 to the Wound roll.

Infos.Title: DAEMONIC ALLEGIANCE
Infos.Text:
When you select this model to include in your army, you must select one of the following keywords for it to gain:
	▪ Khorne
	▪ Tzeentch
	▪ Nurgle
	▪ Slaanesh

UnitAbilities.Title: Tormentbringer (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While a friendly Slaanesh Legiones Daemonica unit is within 6" of this model, melee weapons in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Hysterical Frenzy (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per Fight phase, just after an enemy unit selects a Slaanesh Legiones Daemonica unit from your army as a target, one friendly Psyker that is within 6" of that Slaanesh unit and has this ability can use it. If it does, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that Slaanesh unit is destroyed, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. That model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

UnitAbilities.Title: Scythed Impact
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this unit makes a Charge move, until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [ANTI-INFANTRY 4+] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Infernal Engines of Torment
UnitAbilities.Text: In the Fight phase, after this model has finished making its attacks, if one or more enemy units were destroyed as a result of those attacks, every enemy unit within 6" of this model must take a Battleshock test.

UnitAbilities.Title: Daemonic Locus
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, in your Command phase, you can return 1 destroyed Bodyguard model, or D3 destroyed models with the Battleline keyword, to that unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Daemon of Blood
UnitAbilities.Text: Improve this model’s Move characteristic by 2", and its Toughness and Wounds characteristics by 1. If this model is a Daemonic Charioteer, change this model’s Save characteristic to 3+. Add the Khorne keyword, add the Blood Legions Faction keyword, and it gains the Pact of Blood Faction ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Collar of Khorne
UnitAbilities.Text: This model has the Feel No Pain 3+ ability against Psychic Attacks.

UnitAbilities.Title: Juggernaut of Khorne
UnitAbilities.Text: Improve this model’s Move characteristic by 2", its Toughness characteristic by 3, change its Save characteristic to 3+, it is equipped with 1 Juggernaut’s bladed horn in addition to the weapons you choose in Step 4, change its Infantry keyword to Mounted, and replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Bloodcrushers.

UnitAbilities.Title: Bloodmarked
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of the Fight phase, select one enemy unit within 18" and visible to this model. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly Khorne unit makes an attack that targets that unit, improve the Strength, Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of that attack by 1.

UnitAbilities.Title: Rage-fuelled Strength
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Restless Prey-seeker
UnitAbilities.Text: You can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for this unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Malefic Impact
UnitAbilities.Text: Melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have [LANCE].

UnitAbilities.Title: Daemon of Blood
UnitAbilities.Text: Improve this model’s Move characteristic by 2", and its Toughness and Wounds characteristics by 1. UnitAbilities.Text: You can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for this unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Font of Unreality
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time an attack is allocated to a friendly Daemon unit within 3" of this model, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Text: Improve this model’s Toughness and Wounds characteristics by 2. Add the Nurgle and Psyker keywords, add the Plague Legions Faction keyword, and it gains the Pact of Decay Faction ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Giggling Bilemite
UnitAbilities.Text: Replace this model’s Infantry keyword with the Swarm keyword, and replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Nurglings.

UnitAbilities.Title: Rot Fly
UnitAbilities.Text: Improve this model’s Move characteristic by 4", its Toughness characteristic by 3, replace its Infantry keyword with the Mounted and Fly keywords, and replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Plague Drones.

UnitAbilities.Title: Jolly Gutpipes
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to the Move characteristic of models in that unit and you can re-roll Advance rolls made for it.

UnitAbilities.Title: Keep Counting!
UnitAbilities.Text: Melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Meet Your Quota!
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model’s unit is not Battle-shocked, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

UnitAbilities.Text: While an enemy Psyker unit is within 12" of this model, Psychic weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [HAZARDOUS] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Daemon of Change
UnitAbilities.Text: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save. If this model is a Daemonic Charioteer, add 6" to this model’s Move characteristic, and it has the Fly keyword. Add the Tzeentch and Psyker keywords, add the Scintillating Legions Faction keyword, and it gains the Pact of Sorcery Faction ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Disc of Tzeentch
UnitAbilities.Text: Improve this model’s Move characteristic by 6", change its Infantry keyword to Mounted, add the Fly keyword, and replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Screamers.

UnitAbilities.Title: Eldritch Flames
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit that was hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, that unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

UnitAbilities.Title: Blazing Warpfire
UnitAbilities.Text: Ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [ASSAULT] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Malefic Deceit
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time an attack is made against this unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Rider of the Immaterial Winds
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, at the end of your opponent’s turn, if this model’s unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove that unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.
